policy_rules.name: Guest must be isolated from internal services
policy_rules.condition_expression: ssid.internal_access equals false AND applied ACL deny exists
policy_rules.evidence_required: VLAN gateway + applied ACL + show access-lists
policy_rules.false_positive_guard: Do not pass on ACL text alone; require ip access-group binding on the guest gateway.
policy_rules.acceptance_criteria: Guest VLAN has an inbound/outbound deny to internal subnets and Internet/DNS still allowed.
policy_rules.remediation: Apply guest isolation ACL inbound on the guest VLAN gateway and verify with show access-lists + show running-config interface.

policy_rules.name: Client role must match SSID role
policy_rules.false_positive_guard: Ignore stale client rows older than the active import unless a live event confirms association.
policy_rules.acceptance_criteria: Client role, SSID role, VLAN and DHCP subnet align.
policy_rules.remediation: Fix identity group mapping or move the user to the correct SSID.

policy_rules.name: AP uplink must support expected VLAN
policy_rules.false_positive_guard: Prefer operational trunk evidence over planned AP inventory only.
policy_rules.acceptance_criteria: Every AP serving the SSID has the expected VLAN on its uplink trunk.
policy_rules.remediation: Add missing WLAN VLANs to AP uplink trunks and regenerate validation.

policy_rules.name: Management plane must avoid weak services
policy_rules.condition_expression: no telnet, enable password, insecure HTTP, or exposed SNMP community indicators
policy_rules.false_positive_guard: Flag only when direct config line evidence exists.
policy_rules.acceptance_criteria: SSH-only VTY, enable secret, AAA/local auth, and no insecure HTTP/Telnet evidence.
policy_rules.remediation: Disable Telnet/HTTP, replace enable password with enable secret, restrict SNMP and enforce SSH.

policy_rules.name: Segmentation ACLs should have runtime counters
policy_rules.condition_expression: show access-lists counter evidence exists for enforced segmentation ACLs
policy_rules.evidence_required: show access-lists output with match counters
policy_rules.false_positive_guard: Treat zero counters as Review unless traffic simulation was executed.
policy_rules.acceptance_criteria: At least one active deny/permit ACL line has runtime counter evidence or a documented test result.
policy_rules.remediation: Run a controlled access test, capture show access-lists counters, and attach the evidence.

policy_rules.name: Configured VLANs must be present on operational trunks
policy_rules.condition_expression: configured/access/DHCP VLANs are included in trunk allowed or forwarding evidence
policy_rules.evidence_required: show vlan brief + show interfaces trunk + running-config
policy_rules.false_positive_guard: Do not fail if operational trunk output was not imported; mark Needs Evidence instead.
policy_rules.acceptance_criteria: Every production policy VLAN appears in trunk allowed/forwarding evidence.
policy_rules.remediation: Add missing VLANs to the trunk or update policy inventory, then re-import operational trunk output.

policy_rules.name: Critical uplinks should not show physical error counters
policy_rules.condition_expression: input/output/CRC errors are zero on uplinks and AP trunks
policy_rules.evidence_required: show interfaces counters or show interfaces detail
policy_rules.false_positive_guard: Only escalate when direct counter evidence maps to an uplink/trunk or repeated live events corroborate it.
policy_rules.acceptance_criteria: No CRC/input/output error evidence on critical wireless path interfaces.
policy_rules.remediation: Inspect cable/SFP/duplex, clear counters, monitor again, and document the before/after state.

policy_rules.name: Reports must disclose missing evidence before claiming pass
policy_rules.condition_expression: line-level evidence confidence >= 70% OR missing commands are explicitly listed
policy_rules.evidence_required: conversion readiness score + missing command checklist + evidence profile
policy_rules.false_positive_guard: Do not punish native .pkt uploads; disclose reduced confidence and ask for exported show commands.
policy_rules.acceptance_criteria: Technical report includes readiness score, missing commands, and traceability stats.
policy_rules.remediation: Import the missing show-command bundle or keep the finding in Needs More Evidence.
